creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
When ZFS is chosen in the installer it tries to set the vfs.zfs.min_auto_ashift sysctl, which does not exist after the OpenZFS import

+----------------Error: sysctl------------------+
| sysctl: unknown oid 'vfs.zfs.min_auto_ashift' |
+-----------------------------------------------+
|                   <  OK  >                    |
+-----------------------------------------------+
